rounds: Two weeks of holding the line on routine — that's actually something, even if it felt like going through the motions. But the Apollo ring moment? They got that one. A colleague opened a door and you closed it. Half-naked man on your finger, zero explanation given.
pattern: They're letting you wear the thing but not be the thing.
focus: One stranger gets the Apollo ring story this week — even just 'it's a god I like.' That's it.
